description: Verso: Order of payment from Shemuel b. Seʿadya ha-Levi. Abū l-Bayān is to pay Maḥfūẓ al-Khādim various sums of dirhams for various things: 6 for one thing, and 4 for his work on skins and carrying things, altogether 10 dirhams. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
